predictedBugs: User profile lookup failure (Redis/Supabase down) gracefully falls back to anonymous tier
JWT extraction fails silently for malformed tokens, falls back to IP-based key
Race condition when two requests arrive in same window second — Redis INCR atomicity handles this correctly
ENDPOINT_RATE_LIMITS JSON env var parsing failure is caught and logged, current config preserved
edgeCases: Anonymous user on /v1/buscar -> gets 3 RPM as configured
Empty auth header on public SEO endpoint -> tier=anonymous, uses IP key
Unknown endpoint path not in _ENDPOINT_RATE_LIMITS -> falls back to general tier RPM
Feature flag disabled (RATE_LIMIT_PER_ENDPOINT_ENABLED=false) -> no-op, global limiter handles
